events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: 83 years young! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember the first video they played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Cast your mind back to 1994! Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' on this day – still a Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place on this day in 1969, featuring iconic performances over three days.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock brought together half a million people for three days of peace, love, and music. Which performance defines it for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: We remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977, 49 years ago.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the King. What's your favourite Elvis track that still gets you all shook up?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: We pay tribute to guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on September 18, 1970, 56 years ago.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix today. His influence on music is still electric!

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road Album
events.blurb: We're taking a trip down memory lane to The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, originally released on September 26, 1969, 57 years ago.

angles.name: Iconic Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Still crossing that road! The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' album was released 57 years ago this month. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll legend Chrissie Hynde! What's your go-to Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: We reflect on John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine', which was originally released in 1971, 55 years ago.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: The First iPod Launched
events.blurb: We're looking back at the revolutionary first Apple iPod, which changed music listening forever after its launch on October 23, 2001, 25 years ago.

angles.name: Music Revolution
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago this month, Apple launched the first one and put 1,000 songs in your pocket!

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks Global James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini to 64 years since 'Dr. No' premiered. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His message of peace still resonates today.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British actor and comedian, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the hilarious John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album'
events.blurb: We revisit The Beatles' groundbreaking self-titled double album, commonly known as the 'White Album', first released on November 22, 1968, 58 years ago.

angles.name: White Album Revisited
angles.copy: An album like no other! The Beatles' 'White Album' dropped 58 years ago this month. What's your standout track from the double LP?
